name: Bean Sprouts with Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over medium heat.
2. Stir-fry the garlic and soybean paste for 1 minute until fragrant.
3. Add the onion, bean sprouts, chili peppers, and tomatoes to the wok.
4. Cook, stirring frequently, for an additional 2 minutes until the vegetables are tender but still crisp.
5. Remove from heat and garnish with chopped green onions and cilantro.
6. Serve hot.
